publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 148-150. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: My Dear. Your other kind letter of this morning also delighted me. So far from thinking you wish for too much society, I scarcely feel that you quite wish for as much as I should judge to be no more than beneficial, if I get into the health which I expect.
Without having a constant racket I yet
should be very sorry to have only two parties between Xmas & March, were I all right.
However I must be all right for some weeks or even months, before you will feel any confidence.
My head is becoming quite the thing again; & I not only bear, but am now much benefitted by, a glass or two of wine in the course of the day.
I am amused at your idea of telling people "the real state of the case"; because it is just simply impossible. No one not

medical can form any true idea of the state of the case; & even the M. D's themselves would not in general do so, until after much intimate study & experience of me. The compound of power with delicacy of highness & lowness is not what any one can comprehend, & to endeavour putting just notions into their minds, is all vain. If however, you mean that it is better not to make a great mystery, or to appear to avoid the subject when

asked, you are indeed very right. And don't, my dear, fancy I am dissatisfied. I only am rather amused at your perhaps having tried to make the incomprehensible plain; & very likely I have even not quite rightly understood you.
I shall send down per coach on Monday Morg, to say my plans, & if I return that evening or not.
The Hen is very ill in bed, at Groves' Hotel; one of her worst attacks. I am
I believe she is going to have Dr Locock tonight.
Pray write to me, my Dear, tomorrow.
I am quite satisfied with your care of my dear animal-- Taggy.
My dear, I am sure that (as Annabella said), Papa is very fond of Mama's horse.
Will you remember to send me 10..0..0 tomorrow. Pray don't forget it. Good Bye. I wish I could write you somewhat more amusing. Ou is a good nice Crow, & I love ou.
